repo.description: Backups a Hashnode blog including the images from the CDN

terms.context_snippet: [Hashnode](https://www.hashnode.com) is a great blogging service and has a nice Github action for syncing your posts to a repository as a backup mechanism. However, at the time of writing, the backup mechanism does not extract the images from the CDN.
